comments.body: WIP to see how the test suite fairs on the CI ... no review needed yet.
@baude what is the latest on this now?
Looks pretty good.  I think we should do this but we need to fix up my questions above.
@rhatdan I am still trying to get all the tests to pass and i have some outstanding questions on the whole validate tags business for nalin.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 2bada5d) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
actually looks like the help for containers just has `Examples:`
@TomSweeneyRedHat I'd be appreciative for you to do a follow up PR to clean up these small issues.  If someone finds something else pre-merge that they want fixed, I'll do them though.

Lets cleanup in follow up PR. so we can get this moving.  @TomSweeneyRedHat Could you fix your nits.

@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 3efae30 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 3efae30d7ec77aade38c8efdbac5f61460a33082 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

Happy to fix up the nits.  The only one I'm not sure of is the 'Examples' bit being listed in the help.  Baude if you know how to change that and could send a ptr, I'd appreciate it.  If not, I'll dig.
